summary: Closeout packet for financial-agents (verdict: checkpoint_complete). 4 memory candidates.

extracted.text: Yahoo Finance chart endpoint is keyless and works for daily OHLCV
extracted.rationale: https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/<SYMBOL>?period1=<unix>&period2=<unix>&interval=1d returns JSON with timestamp + indicators.quote[0].{open,high,low,close,volume} arrays. No API key, no auth, no cookie. The download endpoint (v7/finance/download) requires login; the chart endpoint does not. Works for SPY, QQQ, AAPL, NVDA, TSLA, BTC-USD as of 2026-06-17. Rate limits unknown but a single 6-symbol basket fetch is fine. Yahoo may add a crumb-cookie wall later — keep the cache fallback.

extracted.text: Stooq daily CSV endpoint is dead for non-browser clients
extracted.rationale: As of mid-2026, stooq.com/q/d/l/?s=<sym>&i=d returns an HTML page with a JavaScript proof-of-work challenge (SHA-256 leading-zero-nonce) instead of CSV. Plain Node fetch / curl cannot pass the wall — it requires executing JS in a browser to obtain a session cookie. Same wall on stooq.pl. Do not rely on Stooq for any non-browser data ingestion. Use Yahoo Finance chart endpoint or another keyless source instead.

extracted.text: HyperSwarm reviewer lane routed to Tier-A model returned ungrounded verdict
extracted.rationale: A delegate_task reviewer lane routed to phi4-mini-64k:latest (Tier-A cheap model) for a Tier-C adversarial review job (math + diversity + honesty + URL-pattern verification) returned an ungrounded verdict. It claimed 'math_check fail' with no row citations, reported the wrong URL pattern (cited /stock-market/quote?symbol=SPY which is not what data.js uses), and answered 'overwrite_risk: no' despite the run literally overwriting the prior 2026-05-29-leaderboard.json. Captain re-verified the math directly from the artifact and confirmed all 6 rows were correct. Per HyperSwarm doctrine: reserve premium models for reviewer/breaker lanes. Routing a Tier-C job to a Tier-A model produces noise, not review.

extracted.text: Multi-session performance aggregator not yet built for financial-agents
extracted.rationale: Current harness writes one leaderboard artifact per session. Cross-session aggregation (win-rate over N sessions, cumulative $10 growth, Sharpe-like risk-adjusted measure, strategy consistency) is not yet built. This is the next maturity step before any broker-gated live execution. Owner: future task under plan financial-agents.

open_gaps: task-2026-06-02-017: broker-gated paper/live execution adapter — blocked on Fritz's broker credentials (Alpaca paper recommended first). Cannot progress without a Fritz decision.
Multi-session aggregator not yet built — current harness writes one artifact per session; cross-session win-rate / cumulative-$ / Sharpe-like measure is a separate follow-up task.
